detail.emulator_description: This operating system is proprietary. To launch it, provide your own legally obtained disk image when emulator support is enabled in a future update.
detail.emulator_opensource: This open-source OS is compatible with browser-based emulation. Full emulator support is coming soon.
detail.not_found_desc: The operating system you requested could not be found in the museum database.

about.title: About the Museum
about.subtitle: A digital monument to computing history
about.mission: The Operating Systems Museum exists to preserve, celebrate, and educate about the software that made the digital age possible. Every OS represented here shaped the computers, devices, and culture we know today.
